title: Version 1.1 — Billing Maturity
summary: **Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.2` P0-heavy **Service task slices** · `.3`–`.6` P1 / surface-data · `.7`–`.9` ops + minor freeze.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["1.1.x Billing Maturity"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    csv["CSV upload via app or gateway"]
    csv --> s3["s3storage object / upload module"]
    s3 --> job["jobs create DAG"]
    job --> bulk["bulk finder or verify processor"]
    bulk --> batch["batch credit deduction"]
    batch --> bill["billing or purchaseAddon path"]
    bill --> gate["1.1 release gate"]
